title: Storage Maniacs
description: Storage Maniacs is an annoying modpack about collecting EVERY item in vanilla Minecraft
body:
![Storage Maniacs Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9ab0de0160ad6b0a84eab6f1a035080d3ce9f37.png)

# Storage Maniacs!

**Storage Maniacs** is a challenging, annoying modpack centered around collecting and storing **every item** in the base game.

## Storage Tech!
![AE2 Storage System with an assortment of items inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/298c6f7a8ae140da52beb04ca00a2c1b9ad76b0f.png)

Making use of the **Applied Energistics 2** mod, create huge storage systems to store all of the items you'll be collecting. Better prioritise item types, you'll need them!

## Progress Tracking
![Quest book showing various items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41d59cea0673ce7ab0937ba7f481b8d5f68c9014_0.webp)
Track your progress using **FTB Quests**!  
Note that FTB quests is not included in the pack, you will be prompted download it upon first launch

## Featured mods:

- Applied Energistics 2
- Create (+ addons)
- Farmer's Delight
- Mekanism
- Moving Elevators
- Performance Mods
